commands_run.notes: External aggregation completed after the real four-stage smoke run.

tests.name: external result aggregation
tests.notes: Smoke summary reported pass rate 1.0 and zero regressions, scope drift, hygiene, handoff, and board consistency violations.

tests.name: non-blocking reviewer adapter
tests.notes: Reviewer JSON risks are recorded without replacing deterministic acceptance.

decisions: Aggregate overall and per-condition metrics from external run directories.
Keep independent reviewer findings non-blocking so an AI reviewer cannot approve its own implementation.
Provide a separate read-only boardflow-reviewer skill.
risks: An independent read-only reviewer sub-agent was requested after implementation, but the service rejected the run because its usage quota was exhausted. Deterministic gates, local audit, and regression tests were completed; no independent qualitative report is attached.
next_recommended_step: Run calibrated multi-agent experiments and inspect per-condition summaries alongside reviewer reports.
